summary: Verified School Pod architectural change: Coach workflow now flows from Mission Control → Click Athlete → Athlete Overview with School List → Click School → School Pod. All 12 backend tests pass. All 11 frontend test cases pass.
critical_code_review_comments: School Pod implementation is clean with proper health classification and signal generation
New route /support-pods/:athleteId/school/:programId properly configured in App.js
Back navigation works correctly from School Pod to Athlete Pod
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_SchoolPod_, TEST_UI_Action_, TEST_UI_Note_ prefixed actions and notes during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: School Pod architecture fully working. Flow: Mission Control -> Click athlete -> Athlete Overview (SupportPod.js with school list) -> Click school -> School Pod (SchoolPod.js). Schools list returns 12 schools with health classification sorted by urgency (at_risk/needs_attention first). School Pod shows signals, actions, notes, timeline, school coach contact info.

test_02_get_athlete_schools_list - Returns 12 schools sorted by urgency ✓
test_03_get_school_pod_data - Returns full pod data with all sections ✓
test_04_create_school_scoped_action - Creates action scoped to school ✓
test_05_create_school_scoped_note - Creates note scoped to school ✓
test_06_verify_action_appears_in_pod - Created action visible in pod ✓
test_07_verify_note_appears_in_pod - Created note visible in pod ✓
test_10_health_classification - All schools have valid health states ✓
test_12_cleanup_test_data - Test data marked for cleanup ✓

Add Action button opens form, saves action, shows in list ✓
Add Note button opens form, saves note, shows in list ✓
Back button navigates to Athlete Pod ✓
School list visible after back navigation ✓
